channel.title: Casa Caravan — Fermentation Lab
channel.description: Sourdough, kombucha, kefir, kimchi and fermentation knowledge from a decade of practice in Cyprus.

item.title: Sourdough Starter — A Decade of Living Culture
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: 200g of living sourdough culture maintained for nearly a decade. Pioneer of sourdough bread in Cyprus. Feed 1:1 flour and water by weight. Use 200g per 1000g of flour. Cyprus delivery. €15. The Fermentation Lab offers calculators for sourdough, kombucha, kefir, kimchi and more.

item.title: Fermentation Lab — Browser-Based Recipe Calculators
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: Free browser-based calculators for sourdough bread, kombucha, water kefir, milk kefir, kimchi and lacto-fermented vegetables. No account required. Built from a decade of fermentation practice in Cyprus.
